description: Customers Bancorp, Inc. operates as the bank holding company for Customers Bank that provides banking products and services. It provides deposit banking products, which includes commercial and consumer checking, non-interest-bearing and interest-bearing demand, MMDA, savings, and time deposit accounts, as well as individual retirement accounts and non-retail time deposits consisting of jumbo certificates. The company's lending business offers commercial and industrial, commercial real estate, and multifamily and residential mortgage loans; SBA lending; mortgage finance; specialty lending inclu
